rationale: The cited paper appears only once in a grouped citation supporting the statement that perceived service quality can be measured using repeated cross-sections. The citing paper does not discuss Srinivasan et al. (2010)'s integrative mind-set framework, findings, or VARX decomposition as a basis for its hypotheses, model design, or interpretation. Its core DASVAR contribution is developed from other theoretical and methodological sources, so this citation functions as background precedent rather than a meaningful building block.
